category_sources: source_facts.description identifies ETL as the Extensible Template Library.
source_facts.repo points to the official Synfig source repository, where ETL is part of the Synfig project.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description expands the name as Extensible Template Library; executable ETL-config and source archive ETL-1.5.5 use uppercase ETL.
docs_sources: Official Synfig wiki is the main documentation for the Synfig project.
Official synfig/synfig repository README is an official documentation surface for the source tree that includes ETL.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.repo and source_facts.homepage tie ETL to the Synfig animation project.
